scripts.compile: npm run compile:student && npm run compile:faculty
scripts.generate:student: rm -rf dist/student/client && openapi-generator-cli generate -i ./dist/student/openapi.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o ./dist/student/client --git-user-id=polito --git-repo-id=api-spec --additional-properties=npmName=@polito/student-api-client,npmRepository=https://npm.pkg.github.com/,supportsES6=true,modelPropertyNaming=original,removeOperationIdPrefix=true && cp dist/student/openapi.yaml dist/student/client/openapi.yaml && cd dist/student/client
scripts.generate:faculty: rm -rf dist/faculty/client && openapi-generator-cli generate -i ./dist/faculty/openapi.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o ./dist/faculty/client --git-user-id=polito --git-repo-id=api-spec --additional-properties=npmName=@polito/faculty-api-client,npmRepository=https://npm.pkg.github.com/,supportsES6=true,modelPropertyNaming=original,removeOperationIdPrefix=true && cp dist/faculty/openapi.yaml dist/faculty/client/openapi.yaml && cd dist/faculty/client
scripts.generate: npm run generate:student && npm run generate:faculty
scripts.build:student: npm run compile:student && npm run generate:student
scripts.build:faculty: npm run compile:faculty && npm run generate:faculty
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run generate
scripts.copy-local:student: rm -rf ../students-app/node_modules/@polito/student-api-client/* && rsync -av ./dist/student/client/ ../students-app/node_modules/@polito/student-api-client/ && cd ../students-app/node_modules/@polito/student-api-client && npm run build
scripts.copy-local:faculty: rm -rf ../faculty-app/node_modules/@polito/faculty-api-client/* && rsync -av ./dist/faculty/client/ ../faculty-app/node_modules/@polito/faculty-api-client/ && cd ../faculty-app/node_modules/@polito/faculty-api-client && npm run build
scripts.copy-local: npm run copy-local:student && npm run copy-local:faculty
